overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi RPG showing a character in a yellow jacket exploring a futuristic indoor food court with warm neon lighting. The character approaches a service counter, then turns and walks toward a glass exit leading to a neon-lit city street.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic food court with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the food court toward the service counter

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind the food service counter

entered.detail: curved metallic counter with illuminated edges and service displays
illuminated menu display showing food items above the counter
rows of booth seating with tables along the glass windows
large glass panels looking out to neon-lit city street
purple neon sign reading THE VOID visible through upper windows
hanging holographic advertisement display with colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a warmly lit futuristic food court with yellow and orange neon lighting. A curved food service counter dominates the right side with a vendor behind it, while booth seating lines the left wall along large glass windows revealing a neon-lit city outside.

events.description: character stops at the food service counter
character turns away from counter and resumes walking

agents.ego_description: pausing briefly at the counter then turning to walk away

notable_agents.action: vendor behind counter looking toward the character

entered.detail: automatic glass exit doors visible at the far end of the room

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the food counter where a vendor stands behind the curved metallic surface, then turns and walks away. The seating booths move closer on the left as the character heads toward glass exit doors visible in the distance.

events.description: approaching and passing through automatic glass exit doors

agents.ego_description: walking past seating areas toward the glass exit doors leading outside

notable_agents.action: customer sitting in booth near the windows

entered.detail: neon-lit city street visible through the approaching glass doors

segments.scene_description: The character walks past booth seating where a customer sits near the windows, approaching the automatic glass exit doors. The neon glow of the city street becomes visible through the doors as the character nears the transition from indoor food court to the urban exterior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a warmly lit futuristic food court that gradually transitions toward a neon-lit urban exterior. It begins with the character walking past a curved food service counter bathed in yellow and orange neon light, with booth seating lining the left wall. As the character stops briefly at the metallic counter and turns away, the perspective shifts toward a set of distant glass exit doors. The scene then moves past a seated customer by the windows, with the indoor warmth receding as the character approaches the automatic doors. Finally, the camera nears the threshold, where the interior glow gives way to the vibrant neon lights of the city street visible just beyond the glass.
